# Eco Mobile Wash

> Eco-friendly mobile car, EV, motorcycle, RV, and specialty vehicle detailing in San Diego, California. We come to your location with EPA-approved, waterless wash technology.

## Business
- Name: Eco Mobile Wash
- Website: https://ecomobilewash.com/
- Phone: (619) 800-8239
- Email: contact@ecomobilewash.com
- Service area: San Diego, CA and surrounding communities
- Booking: https://calendly.com/ecomobilewash/booking

## Primary services
- Thoro-Interior detail — $99
- Eco Full Detail — $199
- Eco Bike Detail — $129
- E-Bike Detail — $119
- E-ATV Detail — $119
- Eco RV Detail — per-foot pricing
- Add-on services: ceramic coating, pet hair removal, stain removal, shampoo, leather treatment, and more

## Key pages
- Home: https://ecomobilewash.com/
- Book online: https://ecomobilewash.com/booking.html
- Bike, ATV & RV services: https://ecomobilewash.com/html/pages/bike.html

## Brand notes
- Parent company: WeMake, Corp.
- Supports AppChurch Global Foundation
- Uses sustainable, low-water mobile detailing methods
